Acme Silicon Senior RTL Engineer
Location: Austin, TX
About the role
You will design, implement, and verify RTL for high-performance accelerators.
Responsibilities
You will work with architecture teams, write SystemVerilog, debug simulations,
review waveforms, and support synthesis handoff for reusable IP blocks.
Qualifications
Requirements include digital design experience, computer architecture knowledge,
Python scripting, Git, and clear documentation habits.
Preferred qualifications include FPGA prototyping, timing closure exposure, and
experience with verification-driven hardware development.
